docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,762.92 FILED BY GUGIC, IVANA AS TO DEFENDANT PHARAOH/NOB HILL ASSOCIATES L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-23-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PHARAOH/NOB HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUGIC, IVANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHARAOH/NOB HILL ASSOCIATES L.P. $2,767.46 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,892.46, DEFENDANT PROVIDED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF LEGITIMATE DEDUCTIONS FOR MISSING SMOKE DETECTORS. COURT FINDS DEPOSIT WAS NOT HELD IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KEVIN KUMANA, DIRECTOR SFRENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PHARAOH/NOB HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF IVANA GUGIC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PHARAOH/NOB HILL ASSOCIATES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KEVIN KUMANA, DIRECTOR SRENTS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY GUGIC, IVANA PHARAOH/NOB HILL ASSOCIATES L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2026 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO APR-03-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IVANA GUGIC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PHARAOH/NOB HILL ASSOCIATES LP REPRESENTED BY KEVIN KUMANA, DIRECTOR SF RENT IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREED TO TRY TO COME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY BY 1 DAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE.
